name: Marshmallow Cream Peach Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Diced peaches (from 5 to 6 medium peaches)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt marshmallows in milk using a double boiler.
2. Allow the mixture to cool until it sets.
3. Beat until smooth and fold into whipped cream.
4. Fold the diced peaches into the marshmallow-cream mixture.
5. Pour the filling into the graham cracker crust.
6. Chill several hours, or until firm.
Source: Farm Journal Bev Christensen
